scripts.build:mac: export NODE_OPTIONS='--disable-warning=DEP0147' && node -e "if(process.platform!=='darwin'){console.error('Build for macOS must be run on macOS');process.exit(1)}" && tauri build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const b='src-tauri/target/release/bundle';const out='bundles';fs.mkdirSync(out,{recursive:true});['dmg','macos'].forEach(d=>{const dir=path.join(b,d);if(fs.existsSync(dir)){fs.readdirSync(dir).forEach(f=>{const ext=path.extname(f);if(ext==='.dmg'||ext==='.app')fs.cpSync(path.join(dir,f),path.join(out,f),{recursive:ext==='.app'});});}});console.log('Bundles copied to bundles/');"
scripts.build:win: node -e "if(process.platform!=='win32'){console.error('Build for Windows must be run on Windows');process.exit(1)}" && tauri build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const b='src-tauri/target/release/bundle';const out='bundles';fs.mkdirSync(out,{recursive:true});['nsis','msi'].forEach(d=>{const dir=path.join(b,d);if(fs.existsSync(dir)){fs.readdirSync(dir).forEach(f=>{const ext=path.extname(f).toLowerCase();if(ext==='.exe'||ext==='.msi')fs.cpSync(path.join(dir,f),path.join(out,f));});}});console.log('Bundles copied to bundles/');"
scripts.build:bundles: tauri build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const b='src-tauri/target/release/bundle';const out='bundles';fs.mkdirSync(out,{recursive:true});const map=process.platform==='darwin'?[['dmg','.dmg'],['macos','.app']]:[['nsis','.exe'],['msi','.msi']];map.forEach(([d,ext])=>{const dir=path.join(b,d);if(fs.existsSync(dir)){fs.readdirSync(dir).forEach(f=>{const e=path.extname(f).toLowerCase();if(e===ext||(ext==='.app'&&f.endsWith('.app')))fs.cpSync(path.join(dir,f),path.join(out,f),{recursive:ext==='.app'});});}});console.log('Bundles copied to bundles/');"
